name: Catalogizer Security Validation Test Bank
description: Security tests for auth, tokens, injection prevention, rate limiting, CORS, sessions, and transport security

test_cases.name: Protected endpoint requires authentication

steps.name: Access with valid token
steps._original_action: GET /api/v1/entities with valid JWT in Authorization header

test_cases.expected_result: Protected endpoints reject unauthenticated requests

test_cases.name: All write endpoints require authentication

steps.name: POST without token
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with valid body but no Authorization header

steps.name: PUT without token
steps._original_action: PUT /api/v1/entities/1 with valid body but no Authorization header

test_cases.expected_result: All write operations require authentication

test_cases.name: Expired JWT token rejected

steps.name: Create expired token
steps.action: Use a JWT token with exp claim in the past

test_cases.expected_result: Expired tokens rejected with clear error

test_cases.name: Invalid JWT signature rejected

steps.name: Craft token with wrong secret
steps.action: Sign a JWT with a different secret key than server uses

test_cases.expected_result: Tokens with invalid signatures rejected

test_cases.name: Malformed JWT token rejected
test_cases.expected_result: Malformed tokens rejected without server error

test_cases.name: JWT token with none algorithm rejected

steps.name: Craft token with alg:none
steps.action: Create JWT with header {"alg":"none"} and unsigned payload

test_cases.expected_result: None algorithm attack rejected

test_cases.name: JWT token refresh flow

steps.name: Login and get token
steps.expected: 200 OK with access token and refresh token

steps.name: Old token still valid until expiry

test_cases.expected_result: Token refresh provides new valid token

test_cases.name: SQL injection in search parameter rejected

steps.name: Send classic SQL injection
steps.expected: Empty results or 400 Bad Request (not a database dump)

steps.name: Verify no data leak
steps.action: Check response does not contain all entities

test_cases.expected_result: SQL injection in search has no effect

test_cases.name: SQL injection in entity title rejected

steps.name: Create entity with SQL payload
steps.expected: Entity created with literal title string (no SQL execution)
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with title "'; DROP TABLE media_items; --"

steps.name: Verify table intact
steps.expected: Entity list works normally, table not dropped

test_cases.expected_result: SQL injection in title stored as literal text

test_cases.name: SQL injection in sort parameter rejected

steps.name: Send injection in sort
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or sort ignored (not executed)

test_cases.expected_result: SQL injection in sort parameter has no effect

test_cases.name: SQL injection with UNION SELECT rejected

steps.name: Send UNION injection
steps._original_action: GET /api/v1/entities?search=' UNION SELECT username,password FROM users--

steps.name: Verify no credential leak
steps.action: Check response for any user credentials

test_cases.expected_result: UNION SELECT injection blocked

test_cases.name: XSS payload in entity title sanitized

steps.name: Retrieve entity
steps.expected: Title returned with HTML entities escaped or stripped

steps.name: Render in web UI
steps.expected: Script tag not executed, shown as text

test_cases.expected_result: XSS script tag neutralized in output

test_cases.name: XSS payload in search query sanitized

steps.name: Search with script payload
steps.expected: Search returns results normally, payload not reflected as HTML

test_cases.expected_result: Reflected XSS in search prevented

test_cases.name: XSS via event handler attribute

steps.name: View in web UI
steps.expected: Event handler not rendered as attribute, shown as text

test_cases.expected_result: Event handler XSS payload neutralized

test_cases.name: XSS via SVG payload
test_cases.expected_result: SVG-based XSS blocked

test_cases.name: Path traversal in file path rejected
test_cases.expected_result: Path traversal blocked

test_cases.name: Path traversal with encoded slashes rejected
test_cases.expected_result: Encoded path traversal attempts blocked

test_cases.name: Path traversal with null byte rejected
test_cases.expected_result: Null byte path traversal rejected

test_cases.name: Rate limiting on login endpoint

steps.name: Send rapid login attempts
steps.expected: After threshold, responses become 429 Too Many Requests
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/auth/login 20 times in 10 seconds with wrong password

steps.name: Verify rate limit header
steps.action: Check response headers for rate limit info

test_cases.expected_result: Login rate limiting prevents brute force

test_cases.name: Rate limiting on API endpoints

steps.name: Send burst of requests
steps.expected: After rate limit threshold, some requests return 429

steps.name: Wait for rate limit reset
steps.action: playwright: waitFor text=rate limit window to expire
steps._original_action: Wait for rate limit window to expire

test_cases.expected_result: API rate limiting enforced and resets after window

test_cases.name: Rate limiting per IP address

steps.name: Exhaust rate limit from one IP
steps.action: Send requests until 429 from client A

steps.name: Verify other IPs unaffected
steps.expected: Client B receives 200 OK (independent rate limit)

test_cases.expected_result: Rate limits applied per IP, not globally

test_cases.name: CORS headers present on API responses
test_cases.expected_result: CORS headers correctly configured

test_cases.name: CORS rejects unauthorized origins

steps.name: Send request from unauthorized origin
steps.expected: No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header or origin not in allowed list

test_cases.expected_result: Unauthorized origins not reflected in CORS headers

test_cases.name: JSON Content-Type required for POST requests

steps.name: POST with wrong Content-Type
steps.expected: 415 Unsupported Media Type or 400 Bad Request
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with Content-Type: text/plain and JSON body

test_cases.expected_result: Incorrect Content-Type rejected

test_cases.name: Oversized request body rejected

steps.name: Send oversized payload
steps.expected: 413 Request Entity Too Large or connection closed

test_cases.expected_result: Oversized request bodies rejected

test_cases.name: Admin endpoints require admin role
test_cases.expected_result: Admin endpoints enforce role-based access

test_cases.name: Role escalation in JWT payload prevented

steps.name: Craft token with escalated role
steps.action: Create JWT with role 'admin' but signed with user's context

steps.name: Access admin endpoint
steps.expected: 401 Unauthorized or 403 Forbidden (server validates role from DB, not JWT claim alone)

test_cases.expected_result: Role escalation via JWT tampering prevented

test_cases.name: Session invalidated after logout
test_cases.expected_result: Logged-out tokens no longer accepted

test_cases.name: Concurrent sessions allowed

steps.name: Both tokens valid
steps.action: Use Token A and Token B on separate requests

test_cases.expected_result: Multiple concurrent sessions supported

test_cases.name: Password change requires current password

steps.name: Change with correct current password
steps._original_action: PUT /api/v1/auth/password with correct current_password and new_password

test_cases.expected_result: Password change requires current password verification

test_cases.name: Weak password rejected

steps.name: Set very short password
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with password policy error
steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/users does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

steps.name: Set password meeting policy
steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/users does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

test_cases.expected_result: Weak passwords rejected by policy

test_cases.name: Passwords not returned in API responses

steps.name: List users
steps.expected: User objects do not contain password or password_hash fields

test_cases.expected_result: Password hashes never exposed in API responses

test_cases.name: HTTPS required for all API communication

steps.name: Access API over HTTP
steps.expected: Redirect to HTTPS or connection refused

test_cases.expected_result: API only accessible over HTTPS

test_cases.name: HTTP/3 QUIC connection supported

steps.name: Connect via HTTP/3
steps.action: Send QUIC connection to API server

steps.name: Verify Alt-Svc header
steps.action: Check response headers for Alt-Svc: h3

test_cases.expected_result: HTTP/3 QUIC connections supported

test_cases.name: Brotli compression enabled
test_cases.expected_result: Brotli compression applied to responses

test_cases.name: Security headers present on responses
test_cases.expected_result: Security headers set on all responses

test_cases.name: Content Security Policy header present

steps.name: Verify script-src
steps.expected: script-src restricts to self or specific hashes

test_cases.expected_result: CSP header restricts script execution sources

test_cases.name: Server header does not leak version info

steps.name: Check Server header
steps.expected: No detailed server version info (no 'Go/1.24' or 'gin-gonic' version)

test_cases.expected_result: Server header does not expose technology stack details

test_cases.name: Extremely long input handled safely

steps.name: Send very long title
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with length validation error or truncated safely

test_cases.expected_result: Extremely long input rejected or truncated safely

test_cases.name: Unicode and special characters handled safely

steps.name: Create entity with unicode
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/entities with title containing emoji, CJK, RTL characters

test_cases.expected_result: Unicode input stored and retrieved correctly

test_cases.name: Null byte in input rejected

steps.name: Send null byte in title
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or null byte stripped

test_cases.expected_result: Null bytes in input rejected or stripped

test_cases.name: JSON injection in request body

steps.name: Send nested JSON injection
steps.expected: Extra fields ignored, only allowed fields processed

steps.name: Verify no privilege gain
steps.action: Check created entity has no admin properties
steps.expected: Entity created with only allowed fields

test_cases.expected_result: Mass assignment via extra JSON fields prevented

test_cases.name: Command injection in file path rejected

steps.name: Verify no execution
steps.action: Check server is still running normally

test_cases.expected_result: Command injection in file paths blocked

test_cases.name: Command injection with backticks rejected

steps.name: Send backtick injection
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or path treated as literal

test_cases.expected_result: Backtick command injection blocked

test_cases.name: SSRF via storage URL rejected

steps.name: Submit internal URL as storage
steps.action: POST storage config with URL http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/

steps.name: Submit localhost URL
steps.action: POST storage config with URL http://127.0.0.1:6379/

test_cases.expected_result: SSRF attempts to internal services blocked

test_cases.name: Error responses do not leak stack traces

steps.name: Trigger server error
steps.action: Send malformed request designed to cause internal error
steps.expected: 500 Internal Server Error with generic message

steps.name: Check response body
steps.action: playwright: assertVisible text=no Go stack trace, file paths, or line numbers in response
steps._original_action: Verify no Go stack trace, file paths, or line numbers in response

test_cases.expected_result: Stack traces not leaked in error responses

test_cases.name: 404 responses do not reveal file system structure

steps.name: Check response
steps.action: playwright: assertVisible text=no file system paths in response
steps.expected: No absolute paths or directory structure revealed
steps._original_action: Verify no file system paths in response

test_cases.expected_result: 404 responses do not reveal server internals

test_cases.name: Login timing consistent for valid and invalid users

steps.name: Time login with valid username
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid username, wrong password, measure response time

steps.name: Time login with invalid username
steps.expected: Response time similar to valid username case
steps._original_action: POST /api/v1/auth/login with non-existent username, measure response time

steps.name: Compare timings
steps.action: playwright: assertVisible text=difference is < 50ms across 10 attempts

test_cases.expected_result: Login timing does not reveal valid usernames

test_cases.name: Executable file upload rejected

steps.name: Upload executable
steps.action: POST file upload with .exe or .sh file
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with disallowed file type error

test_cases.expected_result: Executable file uploads blocked

test_cases.name: Double extension file upload rejected

steps.name: Upload double extension file
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or file type validated by content, not extension

test_cases.expected_result: Double extension bypass attempt blocked

test_cases.name: MIME type sniffing matches file content

steps.name: Upload file with mismatched MIME
steps.action: POST file with Content-Type: image/jpeg but actual content is HTML
steps.expected: Server validates actual content type, rejects mismatch

test_cases.expected_result: MIME type validated against actual file content

test_cases.name: WebSocket requires authentication

steps.name: Connect WebSocket without token
steps.action: Attempt ws:// connection to /api/v1/ws without auth

steps.name: Connect with valid token
steps.action: Connect ws:// with valid JWT in query param or header

test_cases.expected_result: WebSocket connections require authentication

test_cases.name: WebSocket origin validation
test_cases.expected_result: WebSocket origin validation enforced

test_cases.name: WebSocket message size limit enforced

steps.name: Send oversized WebSocket message
steps.expected: Connection closed with message too large error

test_cases.expected_result: Oversized WebSocket messages rejected

test_cases.name: Session cookies have secure flags

steps.name: Check cookie flags
steps.expected: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict or Lax flags set

test_cases.expected_result: Session cookies have all security flags
